thoughts.analysis: Market Structure Shift detected after breaking 7.754 support. Bearish momentum is strong following a rejection at 7.764. Fair Value Gap exists in the 7.760-7.755 range. Setting TP to target lower liquidity zones while accounting for 0.6% exchange fees. Risk-to-reward ratio is optimized for aggressive scalp.

Bearish Market Structure Shift (MSS) confirmed after the break below 72.80. A Fair Value Gaps (FVG) was created between 72.80 and 72.59. The current price of 72.68 represents a retracement into this bearish FVG, providing an aggressive entry for a continuation move. The Take Profit (TP) is set at 71.85 to ensure the 0.6% exchange fees are covered while maintaining a net profit margin. Stop Loss (SL) is positioned at 73.15, above the recent swing high, to maintain a calculated risk-to-reward ratio.

Detected bullish Market Structure Shift (MSS) after a liquidity sweep at 1705.49. Price is reclaiming the 1708 level with increasing momentum. A Fair Value Gap (FVG) was partially filled, and the current trend suggests a move toward the next liquidity pool above 1725. TP is set at 1728.50 to account for the 0.6% round-trip exchange fees and secure a net profit toward the 50 EUR daily goal. SL is positioned tightly below the recent swing low.

Bearish momentum established after rejection at 58650. Market structure shift (MSS) confirmed on the 30m timeframe. Price is currently consolidating below the 58580 FVG. Target set at 57850 to ensure net profitability after accounting for 0.6% round-trip exchange fees. Tight SL placed above the recent swing high.

Bearish Market Structure Shift (MSS) identified after multiple rejections at the 7.764 level. Recent price action shows displacement to the downside with a bearish Fair Value Gap (FVG) between 7.762 and 7.754. Entry at 7.755 targets the liquidity pool below 7.650. The Take Profit is set at 7.620 to account for the 0.6% round-trip exchange fees while maintaining a net profit margin. Stop Loss is positioned tightly above the recent swing high to manage risk aggressively.

Market structure shift (MSS) confirmed after the break of 72.80 support. Price is currently retracing into a bearish Fair Value Gap (FVG) created during the impulsive move to 72.55. The sell entry at 72.66 targets the lower liquidity pool at 71.80. The Take Profit level is set to ensure a net gain after accounting for the 0.6% round-trip exchange fees, while the Stop Loss is placed tightly above the recent swing high to maintain a high risk-to-reward ratio.

Detected liquidity sweep at 1705.49 followed by a Market Structure Shift (MSS) to the upside. Price is reclaiming previous consolidation zones. FVG identified between 1705.8 and 1707.19. Aggressive buy entry to capture momentum towards 1735 resistance, accounting for 0.6% round-trip fees.
